answers.contents:
我想这是人生中最难以面对的问题。
生活的价值明明和吃饭喝水一样重要，却不像吃饭喝水那样看得见摸得着容易汲取。人世间有太多太多的不如意，亲人的离世，病痛的折磨。对于很多人来说单单是活着就非常不容易了，人真的需要一个生活的答案！
但很遗憾我给不了你这个答案，任何人都给不了你这个答案。因为这个答案只在你自己心中！
人的价值不是通过外物衡量的，每个人都有他心中自己的度量衡！
从这个角度上来讲，人的灵魂是无价的，就像耶稣两千年前为我们揭示的真理一样，每个人都有他自己的价值，能够通过践行他自己心中信念，实现自我灵魂的救赎。希望我的话能够给您在困境中一点帮助。
无论何时请记住上帝爱人！不管您在尘世怎样的卑贱，您的灵魂都是无价之宝，不管经历再大的苦难，只要在心中仍有自由的信仰，人的价值，自我的价值就是绝对的，此世独一无二！
愿您的人生充满祝福！
人不過是地球的零件。就像我們身體内的細胞一樣。但是有一個有趣的問題，如果把控制身體的遙控器交給其中的細胞，結果會怎麽樣？他可以意識到自己是身體的一部分又操縱身體嗎？如果能，這個細胞需要擁有哪些構造才能實現？

非要坚持自己不相信的东西，乃是因为坚持认定「这样装下去有意义」。

这种做法，在「中国」可是「真有意义」，从上到下，从下到上，起码对「中国人」来说，此法拥有「真」到了值得坚持装下去，甚至装够一辈子的「实际价值」。

楼主你既然选择拥抱这个「中国」，那不妨继续把「中国人给你叫好」当作评价标准，远离那些「给你带来精神虚无的洋垃圾」。

---------------------------
品葱最好也戒了。

因为随时可能碰上咱这类的毒液散播者啊。

虛無主義就虛無主義，why not
只有共產黨才會聞虛色變，正常人不會對這件事太過敏的。唯物論看世界那世界和人生就真都是虛無，因為唯物論不包括決定價值的主體

The system of value is based on independent axioms, and if someone say they can infer nihilism out of purely scientific or logical reasoning, there must be fallacies around.
So the first step is to check the conclusive process of every attempt to claim the necessity of nihilism carefully, don't let it slide easily.
And the second, is just to make sure whether there is something you are truly into or hating, then try to grasp the very basic rule of how you attribute the property of aesthetics or ethics to everything related. With these managed properly, it's trifle for you to construct your own system of value with awareness.
That's it, and if you have anything to ask, let's talk about it.

discussions.content: I'v made every effort in which I'm doing— applying for the Master of Computer Science. （之前用what，感觉不对劲，应该是which）
学了十几年英语，也一直不会说
@德州仪器:没关系的，我法语也不好。现在您现实主要的困难是考计科的研有点难是吗？
the words between 2 commas are parenthesis which should delete the word "is". I think the values constructed for a system are plural, so are the basic rules.

@a小调回旋曲:Oh, there seems sort of misunderstanding here. When I mention "the second", I'm referring to "the second step" which is just like "the first step" above, so there is no need to delete "it" there. As for the values and rules, I'm seriously talking about a general perception of rules and values, so the single forms are used here.
And if you don't mind, may I fix up your sentences a little bit?

@Nederland:never mind.，ok.  "is" ->"it" is OK. The single form of "value"makes sense. "grasp the very basic rule" means the very basic rule is unique and  "grasp the very basic rules" means there are several basic rules. Both sentences have no gramma mistakes but a bit difference of meaning and I think the latter one would be truer.
@a小调回旋曲:I think you don't get it, cuz I mean "no need to delete 'is' there" in the original reply.
@a小调回旋曲:That is not a parenthesis thing, obviously.
@Nederland: why don't you directly write"the second is just to"? The comma before "is" is unnecessary.

@a小调回旋曲:Because I like it. If you're familiar with this language, there ain't no issue to read through. And hopefully I could ask, do you mean you don't mind being corrected by "Never mind"? You know, it's very impolite for me to correct others without permission in my culture.

@Nederland: Long and complex sentences in writing are serious because they are not oral English or simple sentences. I would think that the accuracy is much more important than politeness and the criteria of pliteneness which are not the same to the oral communication. The writer of long complex sentences should have the responsibility of the misunderstanding of the specific meaning by others that is caused by unproper grammar used, even by an additional comma which changes the structure of a sentence.
@a小调回旋曲:No, it's 100% natural to pause the sentence in the middle, even if I were writing a formal text. And as you could see, I'm just randomly talking.
@Nederland:我被共产党的洗脑学科政治拦在求学的门外

answers.contents:
Don't be vegetarian, be vegan!
Stop hurting animals and feeding on animal flesh and milk, stay in harmony with the earth, and then you'll find the meaning of life.

This is the beginning of the free soul. 

It means you can freely think and experience but not be limited.

Don’t misunderstand it as the end.
我建議你遠離佛教，我看你已經快頓悟萬法皆空的佛理了，不如找個福音派地下教會，我主基督會給你指明道路真理生命，雖然我也不知道家庭教會去哪裡找就是了。
